title: Campylandra tui
taxonomy: Campylandra tui is classified within the family Asparagaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the asparagus family. The genus Campylandra is a part of this family and is native to East Asia. Campylandra tui specifically is a species within this genus. This species is further classified within the subfamily Agavoideae, which is a subfamily of Asparagaceae. The subfamily Agavoideae includes plants that are often referred to as the agaves and allies.
